target: 6. Unseen Warrior
*Pant... pant...*
(I never imagined... I'd be made to walk all the way up a mountain path like this... The forest might be a playground for children, but...)

Hizuru-chan!
Over here, over here!
Don't run in the mountains. It's dangerous.
It's fiiiiine!
Based on what, exactly...
Also, is this the right way? I'm not familiar with the paths around here.
No need to worry~! I've memorized all the paths around here!
Hey... At least tell me where we're heading. Are you trying to guide me to the gun battery ruins or something?
Nope, that's not it~!
What are you two doing there!?
Hey, don't go into the bushes! There are vipers around!
Found you! It's Nezu-san!
Ah? Oh, it's just you, Hoine-chan.
(Nezu... if I recall correctly, he's a hunter. The fact that he's carrying a gun seems to confirm it.)
What are you doing here? I told you not to come near this area.
But if I wanted to see you, Nezu-san, I have no choice but to come here, right?
How many times have you come here saying that? Give it a rest.
(This hunter... seems to be acquainted with Hoine. Just how wide is this niece of mine's social circle?)
Here, take this and go home.
Hehehe~, thanks!
Look, Hizuru-chan! It's a candy shaped like a flower!
Old man... you have quite a cute hobby.
Hmph... I only carry them because she won't listen unless I give her some candy.
Hmm, so it's an effective method for taming a child like Hoine. I'll use that as a reference.
If there's an adult with her, you should have stopped her before she came here. There are wild boars and vipers around here.
Is that so... I really would have liked to hear that before we came here.
Ah, I remember.
…What?
You said your name was Hizuru? From the Minakata family.
Do you know me?
It's a small island.
I see...
(Even if it's because I was with Hoine, I'm surprised he knew I was from the Minakata family.)
(We've barely ever met face-to-face, and I've been away from the island for years.)
You're getting in the way of my work. Hurry up and leave.
(This hunter is quite interesting…)
Hehe, just as planned.
...What is?
Hizuru-chan, you're super interested in Nezu-san, right? It was worth bringing you here.
Don't tell me... you brought me here to introduce me to this hunter?
Yup!
(That's true... even if it's an "island tour", there's no need to be fixated on touring the various locations on the island.)
(Introducing me to interesting people on the island can also safely be called an island tour.)
...It seems my niece is quite a force to be reckoned with.

Ah?
What are you talking about?
Ah, don't worry about it. Just talking to myself.
More importantly, could I ask you a question? Why are you working as a hunter?
Hah? What are you gonna do with that information?
There's no deep meaning behind the question. You can just answer based on your intuition.
Even though I told her to hurry up and leave, this woman won't listen to me either...
If you answer my question, I'll do as you wish. What is your reason for being a hunter?
There are a lot of people on this island who are troubled by pests... Well, that's about it.
I see... So you're secretly protecting this island.
Hmph, it's nothing that grand. If you're satisfied, hurry up and leave.
(A warrior who fights in secret, huh. It's a common trope, but it's not bad.)
(The people who support the world are often those who don't stand out in everyday life.)
However, a hunter seems a bit too plain.
Wh-What are you saying all of a sudden!?
No, I suppose it also depends on the setting of the world...
...What have you been talking about this whole time?
Hizuru-chan, let's head to the next place soon! Bye-bye, Nezu-san!
Excuse me.
What's with those two...?
See you later~!
I told you not to come back here!!
Hehe, wasn't it interesting?
I suppose...
It's good enough that the effort of coming all the way here wasn't wasted.
Next, this way!
Hey, I told you not to run!
